title: Nguigmi heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Nguigmi, with a Z-Score of +3.57. This is a critical weather event with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Nguigmi is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.5 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 68%, and the wind speed is 5.4 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and emphasizing the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
